overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a cyberpunk city street at night, featuring heavy neon lighting, holographic advertisements, and the iconic 'Tyger Claws' gang signage. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing a wet reflective pavement and dense urban architecture with Asian-inspired neon aesthetics.

tall vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements on left side
large pink neon dragon sign with 'TYGER CLAWS' text hanging above the street
tall palm tree visible against the neon-lit background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor with red Chinese characters illuminated on the right wall. The camera moves forward, transitioning into a wider plaza area with wet reflective pavement. Large vertical billboards line the left side while the iconic pink Tyger Claws neon sign dominates the distant center of the frame.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open plaza area featuring large concrete planters with illuminated danger warnings. The path curves to the right around the planters, revealing a building covered in digital billboards on the left and a metal staircase structure on the right. The Tyger Claws neon sign grows larger in the center of the frame as the camera approaches.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves down a narrower street section toward the massive Tyger Claws neon sign that now dominates the center view. The path is partially blocked by a parked red car on the right, requiring navigation around it. The building on the right features large industrial ventilation fans illuminated by red neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with food stalls and gang territory markers

entered.detail: small food vendor stall with illuminated 'COLA' sign and menu displays

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a narrow alleyway past the parked car, with the Tyger Claws sign now visible to the left rear. The path leads toward a food stall with a bright 'COLA' sign where NPCs are standing. Metal barricades line the left side, and the metal staircase structure remains visible on the right as the camera approaches the end of the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide plaza before narrowing into a crowded alleyway. It begins in a tight passage illuminated by red Chinese characters, moving forward as the space expands into a wide plaza with wet, reflective pavement and a distant pink Tyger Claws neon sign. As the camera curves around concrete planters marked with illuminated danger warnings, the view shifts to reveal towering digital billboards and a metal staircase structure while the Tyger Claws sign grows larger in the frame. The scene then tightens as the camera navigates a narrower street, passing a parked red car and industrial ventilation fans glowing with red light. Finally, the path leads deep into a narrow alleyway, leaving the neon signage behind to approach a bright COLA food stall where NPCs gather behind metal barricades.
